title: Mid-Month Test — Part 2 (Weeks 3-4)
description: 20 सवाल: numbers, time, questions, daily vocabulary का comprehensive review।

blocks.question: 40 को अंग्रेज़ी में?
blocks.explanation: 40 = forty। 14 = fourteen। -ty = दहाई, -teen = दस के बाद।

blocks.question: 'Yesterday' का सही opposite?
blocks.explanation: Yesterday (बीता कल) का opposite Tomorrow (आने वाला कल)। Today = आज।

blocks.question: 'How many children do you have?' में 'how many' क्यों?
blocks.explanation: Children गिने जा सकते हैं (1, 2, 3 children) → countable → how many। Water, money → uncountable → how much।

blocks.question: 'It is quarter to four' = ?
blocks.explanation: Quarter to four = 4 बजने में 15 मिनट = 3:45। Quarter past four = 4:15।

blocks.question: 'Always' का use किसके लिए?
blocks.explanation: Always = 100% / हमेशा। Never = 0% / कभी नहीं। Sometimes = कभी-कभी। Often = अक्सर (70-80%)।

blocks.question: 'Who are you?' का हिन्दी अर्थ?
blocks.explanation: Who = कौन। Where = कहाँ। How = कैसे। Why = क्यों।

blocks.question: 'PM' का मतलब क्या है?
blocks.explanation: PM = Post Meridiem = दोपहर 12 के बाद (12 PM to 11:59 PM)। AM = सुबह (12 AM to 11:59 AM)।

blocks.question: 'Because' और 'So' में क्या अंतर है?
options: Because=कारण देता है, So=result देता है
blocks.explanation: Because = कारण: 'I am tired BECAUSE I worked hard.' So = result: 'I worked hard, SO I am tired.'

blocks.question: 'Dozen' का मतलब?
blocks.explanation: A dozen = 12। A baker's dozen = 13। Common expression: 'A dozen eggs' = 12 eggs।

blocks.question: 'Fish and chips' किस देश का national dish है?
blocks.explanation: Fish and chips England/UK का iconic national dish है। Deep-fried fish + fried potatoes। पहले newspaper में serve होता था!

blocks.question: 'I wake up at 6 AM' में 'AM' = ?
blocks.explanation: AM = सुबह (रात 12 से दोपहर 12 तक)। 6 AM = सुबह 6 बजे।

blocks.question: 'How much does it cost?' का उत्तर?
blocks.explanation: Cost के साथ: 'It costs £3.' या 'It is £3.' — currency clearly बताएँ।

blocks.question: Indian English में 'I am doing the needful' = ?
blocks.explanation: 'Indian English' English का valid form है। 'Doing the needful' = 'doing what is required' का Indian expression।

blocks.question: 'See you next week!' में 'next' का मतलब?
blocks.explanation: Next = अगला। 'Next week' = अगले हफ्ते। Previous/Last = पिछला।

blocks.question: Restaurant में bill माँगने के लिए?
options: Can I have the bill, please?
blocks.explanation: Polite way: 'Can I have the bill, please?' या 'Could I get the check?' (American English में check कहते हैं।)

blocks.question: 'Often' का frequency?
blocks.explanation: Frequency adverbs: Always=100%, Usually=80-90%, Often=70-80%, Sometimes=40-60%, Rarely=10-20%, Never=0%.

blocks.question: 'Thirteen' vs 'Thirty' में stress कहाँ?
blocks.explanation: thir-TEEN (stress on TEEN) vs THIR-ty (stress on THIR)। यही -teen vs -ty का मुख्य अंतर है।

blocks.question: 'I wake up at 6 AM every morning' — यह कौन सा tense है?
blocks.explanation: 'I wake up every morning' = Present Simple tense — regular habits और routines के लिए।

blocks.question: 1000 को अंग्रेज़ी में?
blocks.explanation: 1000 = one thousand। 100 = one hundred। 10,000 = ten thousand। 100,000 = one hundred thousand।

blocks.question: 'Good evening' कब कहते हैं?
blocks.explanation: Good morning = सुबह। Good afternoon = दोपहर (12-6)। Good evening = शाम (6 PM के बाद)। Good night = सोते समय।

blocks.title: Question Words Match
blocks.instruction: Question word और हिन्दी अर्थ मिलाएँ:
